The celebration also highlighted the talents of Satish Shah, who received a Padma Shri, and the melodious Alka Yagnik, awarded the Padma Bhushan.

title: Can't get rid of dark spots, pigmentation this summer? Dermatologists reveal treatments that work
description: Seasonal sun exposure often leads to pigmentation issues like dark spots and uneven skin tone. Dermatologists recommend laser treatments, such as Q-switched Nd:YAG and pico-second lasers, to precisely target melanin. These advanced therapies offer minimal downtime and significant results, restoring radiant skin after a few sessions. Consistent sun protection and expert advice are crucial for long-lasting glow.

This initiative aims to streamline the deportation process for apprehended individuals, as mandated by a new national law.

Fans reacted strongly to Kelce chugging beer and celebrating wildly during the game, with some calling his behavior “immature” and “embarrassing.” Others defended the Kansas City Chiefs star for simply enjoying himself. Swift was also dragged into the backlash as social media debates over the celebrity couple intensified.

Police are investigating the incident.

The 'Khalistan National Party' sent the email, also targeting the Ludhiana Mayor's residence and office. Police have been alerted and deployed to Dosanjh's unoccupied house. This comes after Dosanjh reportedly removed pro-Khalistan protestors from a Canadian concert.

Adnoc and Qatar have adapted with controlled fleets and discreet navigation, including shuttle runs and ship-to-ship transfers, to ensure cargo movements despite geopolitical risks and limited broadcast data.

Iran wants all its frozen assets worldwide unfrozen eventually. Differences persist between Iran and the US over certain clauses in a potential agreement. The release of blocked assets remains a point of contention.

India's Agni-V, a comparable MIRV-equipped IRBM, boasts Mach 24 speeds and advanced features, enhancing its survivability and strike capability.

description: The Indian Army is enhancing its 105mm field guns with automatic aiming technology, a significant modernization step. This upgrade aligns with the broader Field Artillery Rationalisation Plan, aiming for a more potent and efficient artillery force.

UP: 12-year-old girl sold by mother for Rs 16,000, 10 saris, raped by ‘buyer’, auto driver
description: A 12-year-old girl from Bihar was allegedly sold by her mother for Rs 16,000 and 10 saris to a 40-year-old man in Uttar Pradesh. After a sham temple marriage, she was repeatedly raped and later abandoned, only to be preyed upon by an auto driver before her rescue. The mother, the man, and the auto driver have been arrested.

title: Jeff Bezos to Amazon users: 'We can’t run Amazon the way NYC runs its school system'
description: Amazon founder Jeff Bezos has sharply criticized New York City's public school spending, likening its inefficiencies to a poorly run business. He argued that substantial funds aren't reaching teachers, despite high per-student costs. Bezos also dismissed 'tax-the-rich' policies, advocating for identifying and solving root causes of economic struggles instead.

title: CEO Mark Zuckerberg's goodbye memo to 8,000 fired Meta staff has 2 promises for survivors
description: Mark Zuckerberg's goodbye memo to 8,000 fired Meta employees on May 20 doubled as a message to the 70,000 staff still standing. The Meta CEO made two promises: no further company-wide layoffs in 2026, and better communication after weeks of internal anxiety. The memo lands as Meta funnels $125-145 billion into AI infrastructure, shifts 7,000 staff to AI projects, and cancels 6,000 open roles.
